title: Coral Reefs
description: For questions 1–8, read the text below and choose which answer (A, B, C or D) best completes each gap.

content.text: Coral reefs are among the most diverse ecosystems on Earth, often (0)........ to as the rainforests of the sea. These underwater structures are home to approximately 25% of all marine species, despite (1)........ less than 1% of the ocean floor. Coral reefs provide essential services, including protecting coastlines from storms and supporting fishing industries that millions of people (2)........ on for their livelihoods. However, these precious ecosystems are under serious (3)........ from climate change, pollution, and overfishing. Rising ocean temperatures cause coral bleaching, a phenomenon that can (4)........ to the death of entire reef systems. Scientists estimate that we have already lost half of the world's coral reefs over the past 30 years. Conservation efforts are (5)........ way in many countries, with marine protected areas being established to allow damaged reefs to recover. Researchers are also experimenting with growing heat-resistant corals that might be able to (6)........ in warmer waters. The (7)........ of these efforts remains uncertain, but there is still hope that we can save these incredible ecosystems. Everyone can (8)........ a part by reducing their carbon footprint and supporting sustainable fishing practices.

example.explanation: 'Referred to as' es la expresión correcta para indicar cómo se denomina algo comúnmente.

questions.explanation: 'Covering' es el verbo correcto para expresar qué porcentaje de una superficie ocupa algo.
'Depend on' es el phrasal verb correcto que significa depender de algo.
'Under threat from' es la expresión correcta para indicar que algo está amenazado.
'Lead to' es el phrasal verb correcto para expresar que algo causa un resultado.
'Under way' es una expresión fija que significa en curso o en marcha.
'Survive' es el verbo más apropiado para describir la capacidad de soportar condiciones adversas.
'Outcome' es el sustantivo más apropiado para referirse al resultado de los esfuerzos.
'Play a part' es una expresión fija que significa participar o contribuir.
